message:
Add optional RepairToolCall hook for fixing invalid tool arguments

When set on GenerateOptions, RepairToolCall is called before sending
validation errors to the model. If repair succeeds, the repaired args
are re-validated and used. If repair fails, the original validation
error is sent to the model as before.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
